text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity being here. The modern, almost sterile hallway leads me into a space dedicated to research and development. The vibrant and bold R+D wall, paired with thought-provoking displays about perception and innovation, makes me reflect on how easily clarity may slip from our grasp in both vision and thought. Here, in the intersection of ideas and technology, I am both unsettled and inspired, acutely aware of the fragile boundaries between confusion and understanding.
